title: Senior Frontend Engineer
shortDescription: Build modern AI-driven interfaces for our enterprise platform.
description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer who is passionate about building scalable, high-performance web applications. You will be working on our core AI platform, developing complex user interfaces using Next.js and React. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of web architecture, state management, and modern CSS/Tailwind.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
shortDescription: Train and deploy deep learning models for predictive analytics.
description: Join our AI research team to build and tune advanced LLMs. You will work on massive datasets to improve model accuracy and deploy these models into production environments. Experience with NLP and transformer architectures is highly preferred.

title: Full Stack Developer
shortDescription: Develop end-to-end solutions for scalable data processing pipelines.
description: We need a versatile developer to help us scale our data processing operations. You will build high-throughput APIs using Node.js and interactive dashboards in Vue.js. Real-time data visualization experience is a plus.

title: AI Product Manager
shortDescription: Lead the product vision for our next-gen AI assistant.
description: Shape the future of AI companions by defining roadmaps, analyzing user data, and working closely with ML engineering teams. You'll drive product execution from ideation to launch.

title: Backend Systems Engineer
description: Design and implement scalable backend services in Go. You will optimize database queries, manage containerized deployments via Kubernetes, and ensure 99.99% uptime.
